brand.name: Mony
brand.tagline: Mony — the video marketplace. Sell, discover, connect.

hero.sub: Mony is the video marketplace that brings creators, boutiques, and collectors together. Buy, sell, and grow your business — in an experience built mobile-first.

videoFirst.title: Video first
videoFirst.body: Every listing starts with a video that catches the eye. Sell with the energy of a live, not the friction of a form.

localGlobal.title: Local and global
localGlobal.body: Filter by distance to find what's near you, or explore sellers from anywhere in the world.

securePayments.title: Secure payments
securePayments.body: Stripe handles every transaction. Pro sellers get paid directly to their bank account.

community.title: Community
community.body: Follow your favorite sellers. See new drops first, comment, negotiate live.

pricing.heading: Become a Pro seller
pricing.sub: One simple price. No commitment. Cancel anytime.
pricing.subcopyPrefix: Open the Mony app and tap

q1.q: How do I start selling on Mony?
q1.a: Download the app, create your account with your email, and post your first video listing. Thirty seconds is all it takes.

q2.q: What's the difference between a free account and Mony Pro?
q2.a: The free account caps at 10 listings with 7% transaction fees. Mony Pro offers unlimited listings, reduced fees at 4%, a weekly featured boost, and an analytics dashboard.

q3.a: Stripe handles every transaction securely. Pro sellers receive their payments directly to their bank account — no middleman, no delay.

q4.q: Can I cancel Mony Pro anytime?
q4.a: Yes, with no commitment. You keep Pro access until the end of your current billing period, then automatically switch back to the free account.

q5.q: Is Mony available in my country?
q5.a: Mony works everywhere. The currency adapts automatically to your region (EUR, USD, AED, GBP, and more) and transactions cross borders without friction.

q6.q: How does Mony protect my privacy?
q6.a: We never sell your data. Your messages and transactions stay private. Full details are in our privacy policy.

q7.a: Through the “Account” menu in the app. Average response time is under 24 hours, in English or French.

footer.tagline: The video marketplace. Sell, discover, connect.

upgrade.title: Become Pro
upgrade.comingSoonBody: Stripe Checkout integration is shipping soon.
